en: It's something, when I was looking on the web, found something out.
Ricky and Steve laugh Karl- What are you talking about?
What? Karl- A- a woman, who had a baby, who was having
a baby. Ricky and Steve laugh Ricky- It was no- it was no clearer when you repeated it.
ko: 칼: 아기를 낳은 여자가 있었는데 그 아기가 아기를 낳았대. 리키 웃음. 스티브: 아뇨

en: There was a woman who had a baby, who had a baby, what do you mean?
ko: 두 번째 말해도 안 알아듣겠는데. 아기를 낳은 여자가 아기를 낳았다니 무슨 말이야? 칼: 아뇨 더 안 읽었어요

en: Karl- No, I didn't- I didn't read any more into it, because I just saw that and I thought-
ko: 두 번째 말해도 안 알아듣겠는데. 아기를 낳은 여자가 아기를 낳았다니 무슨 말이야? 칼: 아뇨 더 안 읽었어요

en: Ricky- You didn't read- what? Karl- That's- that's weird, and then I
ko: 그냥 그거 보고 이상하다 생각했고 학교에서 그 애 상상해봤어요

en: just was thinking, oh, like, imagine the kid at school, at parents' evening.
ko: 학부모 상담 때. 리키와 스티브 웃음

en: Ricky and Steve laugh Ricky- Go on.
Karl- And it's like, well, your kid's pretty good, now let's have a look at your work,
sort of thing. Ricky- But what? Did the child have a baby?
Karl- Yeah. Ricky- Of course it didn't! Play record!
ko: 뭐? 아이가 아기를 낳았어? 칼: 네. 리키: 말이 안 되잖아. 레코드 틀어
